blocks.title: Hero Headline
blocks.description: Full-bleed image hero with eyebrow flourish, highlighted headline words, supporting text, and dual buttons. From the Project B&T homepage Figma ('Hero Blocks' frame, kit instance 'Energy').

blocks.title: Section Heading
blocks.description: A compact heading block with eyebrow, title, and copy.

blocks.title: CTA Banner
blocks.description: A marketing call-to-action with two buttons and token-driven colors.

blocks.title: Centered Intro Text
blocks.description: A full-width intro section with a centered, constrained text container.

blocks.title: Features Section
blocks.description: A light-theme features grid for business-focused landing pages.

blocks.title: Image Text Rows
blocks.description: A repeatable image and text rows section with alternating layouts.

blocks.title: Image Text Row
blocks.description: A single image and text row used inside Image Text Rows.

blocks.title: Posts Grid
blocks.description: A dynamic posts grid designed to match the Balefire visual system.

blocks.title: Page Header
blocks.description: Full-width page header with background image, gradient overlay, and contextual title.

blocks.title: Hero Video Header
blocks.description: Full-width hero with looping background video, gradient overlay, and title.

blocks.title: Section
blocks.description: Full-width layout section with background color and vertical padding.

blocks.title: Container
blocks.description: Max-width constrained, centered container with horizontal padding.

blocks.title: Featured Image Header
blocks.description: Context-aware header using the featured image as background with optional intro text. Replaces the PHP page-heading template on archive, search, 404, and singular pages.

blocks.title: Card Icon Break
blocks.description: A skeleton card with an absolutely-positioned icon, title, and body text. Optional anchor wrapper.

blocks.title: Preheader & Title
blocks.description: A skeleton h2 with an inline preheader span. Styling left to the theme.

blocks.title: Layout Grid
blocks.description: Responsive grid layout with column count and gap controls.

blocks.title: Auto Grid
blocks.description: Flex-wrap grid with centered last row, responsive column counts (desktop/tablet/mobile), gap control, and div/section tag.

blocks.title: Card Media
blocks.description: A skeleton card with an image, logo, title, body text, and learn-more link.

blocks.title: Card Stat
blocks.description: A stat card with title and icon on the same row, followed by key metrics.

blocks.title: Portrait Swiper Slides
blocks.description: A Swiper.js slider with portrait-oriented slides featuring images, titles, links, and overlays.

blocks.title: Logo Grid Item
blocks.description: A single logo image constrained to a uniform size for logo grid layouts.

blocks.title: Section (Flexible Width)
blocks.description: Full-width section with a Tailwind-powered max-width container inside.

blocks.title: Split 35/65
blocks.description: A 35/65 two-column layout with text + button on the left (vertically centered) and image or video on the right.

blocks.title: Feature Row
blocks.description: A 30/70 flex row with an image on the left and vertically centered text on the right.

blocks.title: 2-col-3-col Cards
blocks.description: A card grid with 2 cards on the first row and 3 on the second. Flush-top images, padded text areas.

blocks.title: Simple Card
blocks.description: A simple card wrapper with optional border and padding, accepting any inner blocks.

blocks.title: CTA Centered Text RA
blocks.description: Centered CTA section with preheader, title, body text, and dual button group. All fields optional.

blocks.title: Case Study Compare
blocks.description: Before/after comparison with two cards, an arrow, body text, and CTA button.

blocks.title: FAQ Items
blocks.description: Wrapper block that groups FAQ accordion items together.

blocks.title: FAQ Item (No Borders)
blocks.description: A single FAQ accordion item with a question and answer, using pure CSS details/summary.

blocks.title: Simple Image Card
blocks.description: A card with a flush-top image, white background, rounded corners, and an h3 title. Optional anchor wrapper.

blocks.title: Simple Icon Stacked Cards
blocks.description: A white card with a 40×40px icon (SVG or image) aligned flex-start with an optional link, plus innerBlocks for content.

blocks.title: Simple Steps Card
blocks.description: A centered card with a 96×96px icon (SVG or image), white/20 background, 3px white border, and centered text via innerBlocks.

blocks.title: Image Tile CTA
blocks.description: A two-column section with text content (innerBlocks) on the left and a four-image tile gallery on the right.

blocks.title: Grid Row
blocks.description: A 12-column grid row. Add Grid Cell children to build fractional layouts.

blocks.title: Grid Cell
blocks.description: A cell inside a 12-column grid row. Set span (e.g. 6/12 = half width) and add any blocks inside.

blocks.title: Team Member (Centered)
blocks.description: A centered team member card with image, name, and title. Optional link wrapper.
